title: Inbox approval-notification i18n: subject prefix, status label, relative time
description:
## Goal

Localize the inbox notification rendering for approval items. Found during [ZAI-115](/ZAI/issues/ZAI-115) visual QA ‚Äî three English strings leak through when UI language is Russian:

1. **Subject prefix** ‚Äî `Hire Agent: <name>` keeps `Hire Agent` hardcoded in English.
2. **Approval status badge** ‚Äî `Approved` is rendered as a literal English string.
3. **Relative time** ‚Äî `6h ago` is formatted in English, producing the mixed string `–æ–±–Ω–æ–≤–ª–µ–Ω–æ 6h ago`.

The wrapper word `–æ–±–Ω–æ–≤–ª–µ–Ω–æ` is already localized ‚Äî the leak is in the interpolated values.

Visual: see `inbox-mine-ru.png` attached to [ZAI-115](/ZAI/issues/ZAI-115). The row shows `Hire Agent: CEO` / `Approved –æ–±–Ω–æ–≤–ª–µ–Ω–æ 6h ago`.

## Scope

Out-of-scope from [ZAI-89](/ZAI/issues/ZAI-89), which targeted `StatusBadge` / `KeyboardShortcuts` / `SidebarAgents` / `Inbox` empty state. The approval-notification row rendering is a separate component.

## Reproduction

1. Run the dev server (`pnpm -C ui dev`).
2. Open `/SDF/inbox/mine` with UI language set to Russian.
3. Observe the approval row beneath `SDF-1`.

## Acceptance

- Subject prefix uses an i18n key (e.g. `notifications.subjects.hire_agent`), interpolating the agent name.
- Approval status uses an i18n status map (Approved / Rejected / Pending ‚Äî at minimum, the values that can appear in inbox rows).
- Relative time uses the locale-aware time-formatting helper already present elsewhere in the codebase (search for `formatDistanceToNow` / `formatRelativeTime` usage that already works in RU).
- `scripts/check-i18n-only-diff.sh` clean.
- Updated screenshot of the same row showing fully Russian text attached as proof.

## Files (likely)

- `ui/src/components/Inbox*.tsx` ‚Äî the approval notification row.
- `ui/src/locales/{en,ru}/notifications.json` (or `inbox.json`) ‚Äî new keys for subject prefixes and status labels.
- Time formatting helper ‚Äî locate the existing relative-time formatter and ensure the inbox row uses it instead of an English-locked formatter.
